reviews.comment:
Pare una noche a cenar camino a San Juan, ( 25/06/2020 )ahí la vi una mujer madura y hermosa, espero volver un día solo para tomar un café con ella .. Vino y se fue , creo que vive en la zona..

(Translated by Google)
I stopped for dinner one night on the way to San Juan (June 25, 2020). There I saw her, a mature and beautiful woman. I hope to return one day just to have coffee with her. She came and went; I think she lives in the area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM4bXN1b1FnEAE

reviews.comment:
Está en un lugar de fácil acceso, con todos los servicios. Hasta hay mesas con bancos y frondosa arboleda para un alto en el camino muy confortable.

(Translated by Google)
It's in an easily accessible location, with all amenities. There are even tables with benches and a leafy grove for a very comfortable break along the way.

reviews.comment:
Nunca les fiunciona los descuentos de YPF SERVICLUB, no tienen el descuento del CLUB LA NACION, aplican descuentos tributarios que solo ellos tienen cargados. La atencion del bar, es malisima, no por el personal, sino por las pocas personas que tienen para atender, preferible SHELL

(Translated by Google)
The YPF SERVICLUB discounts never work for them, they don't have the CLUB LA NACION discount, and they apply tax discounts that only they have registered. The service at the bar is terrible, not because of the staff, but because there are so few people working. Shell is much better.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNjaV9tMXVBRRAB
